overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game, beginning inside a retro-futuristic diner with red vinyl booths and neon lighting, then exiting into a dense, vertically-stacked urban night environment with towering buildings, street vendors, and holographic advertisements.

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit diner past red vinyl booth seating occupied by patrons

notable_agents.action: patron sitting in booth eating food

entered.detail: bright red vinyl booth seating with high backs lining the diner
black and white checkered tile flooring covering the diner floor
large window emitting bright pink neon light from outside
condiment bottles, newspapers, and personal items on red tables

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a retro-futuristic diner with vibrant red booth seating and checkered floors. Neon pink light streams through windows as the camera moves past occupied tables where patrons sit eating.

agents.ego_description: moving along the diner counter toward the back exit, passing staff members

notable_agents.action: diner staff member standing behind the service counter

entered.detail: long teal service counter with white countertop and menu displays
row of red vinyl swivel stools along the counter edge
rotating ceiling fan with lights suspended from the ceiling
green illuminated vending machine against the back wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the service area of the diner, revealing a long teal counter with red stools and staff working behind it. A vending machine stands against the back wall as the camera approaches the rear exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor from diner to street

events.description: exits the indoor diner into the outdoor cyberpunk urban environment

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow exit passage leading from the diner into the city

entered.detail: doorway leading from the diner interior to the outside alley
bright pink and blue neon signs illuminating the exterior wall
tall futuristic buildings visible through the exit opening

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow transition space between the diner and the street, passing neon-lit walls before emerging into the open urban environment. The lighting shifts from warm interior to cool exterior neon.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk urban street with vendors and towering buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through the dense cyberpunk street past food vendors and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: street vendor tending to a food stall with cooking equipment
pedestrian in pink jacket walking through the street

entered.detail: massive multi-story structures with stacked architecture and neon lighting
large holographic advertisements and illuminated signs on building facades
food stalls with awnings and cooking equipment along the street
metal scaffolding and industrial pipes connecting buildings
colorful vending machines lining the street walls

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a sprawling cyberpunk urban environment with towering buildings covered in neon billboards. Street vendors operate food stalls along the asphalt street while pedestrians navigate the dense, vertically-stacked cityscape illuminated by artificial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, warm interior of a retro-futuristic diner into a sprawling, neon-drenched cyberpunk cityscape. It begins by gliding past vibrant red booths and checkered floors under a wash of pink neon light before moving deeper into the service area toward a teal counter and a rear exit. As the camera passes through a narrow transition space, the lighting shifts from the warm glow of the diner to the cool, artificial brilliance of the outdoors. The scene then opens fully into a dense urban environment, expanding to reveal towering buildings covered in holographic billboards and street vendors operating along a busy asphalt road.
